title: real_data_test reuses the shared data/kaggle dir rather than an isolated empty system
evidence: test/soccer/real_data_test.clj:12 data-dir "data/kaggle" shared across sub-tests; ATDD prompt asks each scenario start from a running-but-empty system
suggestion: Acceptable as real-data coverage; the acceptance_test.clj suite already uses per-test isolated fixtures (test_helpers.clj:make-fixture-dir!)

title: find_matches also emits head-to-head when both team and opponent given
evidence: src/soccer/query.clj:96-110 appends a head-to-head line, beyond the basic match-listing requirement R3

title: Queries are linear scans over the full in-memory dataset with no indexing
evidence: src/soccer/query.clj:filter-matches filters the whole match vector per call; src/soccer/server.clj:create-server loads everything eagerly
suggestion: Fine for the dataset sizes here and meets the <2s/<5s targets; an index by team/season would scale better but is unneeded for the spec
